query: mutation CreateAgent($agent: AgentInput!) { createAgent(agent: $agent) { _id personalInfo { name systemPrompt welcomeMessage model temperature } appearance { clientMessageBox { backgroundColor textColor } } createdAt } }

personalInfo.name: AVA Support Bot
personalInfo.systemPrompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for Test Company. Answer questions using the knowledge base. Be concise and professional.
personalInfo.welcomeMessage: Hello! How can I help you today?
